heading: Review of certain documents before declassification and release
label: 6231 Review of certain documents before declassification and release
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2671 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Secretary of Energy shall ensure that, before a document of the Department of Energy that contains national security information is released or declassified, such document is reviewed to determine whether it contains Restricted Data.

children.heading: .—Limitation on Declassification
children.label: b .—Limitation on Declassification
children.text: The Secretary may not implement the automatic declassification provisions of Executive Order No. 13526 ( note) if the Secretary determines that such implementation could result in the automatic declassification and release of documents containing Restricted Data.50 U.S.C. 3161
